titleStmt.title: SII 17.448: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 448. (A.R. No. 418 of 1904.) VĒDĀRAṆYAM, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Vēdāraṇyēśvara temple.
The details of date given viz. Makara śu. 2, Tuesday, Śadaiyam, corresponds to 1255 A.D., January 12, Tuesday, ·07; ·67.

This records the gift of 1/4th vēli and 4 mā of land by purchase from Paṭṭaṇaṅkiḻāṉ Tavapperumāḷ, of Anapāyachaturvēdimaṅgalam by Bhāradvāji Periyanambi Tiruttuṟai-pperumāḷ of Iraiyāmaṅgalam alias Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-śaruppēdimaṅgalam (chaturvēdimaṅgalam), in the western division of Umbaḷa-nāḍu, as tiruviḷakkuppuṟam, for burning a perpetual lamp to the deity Tirumaṟaikkāḍu-Uḍaiyār, after paying the taxes on the land.
Among the boundaries of the gift-land are mentioned the village of Irumarabuntūya-Perumāḷpuram and the land endowed as tirunandavanappuṟam by Koṇḍaluḍaiyāṉ Pirudigaṅgaraiyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrācentiracoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu Oṉ
patāvatu makaranāyaṟṟu pūrva pakṣattu dvitiyaiyum cevvāykkiḻamaiy pe
ṟṟa cataiyattunāḷ Umpaḷanāṭṭu melaivakai Iraiyāmaṅkalamā
ṉa kulottuṅkacoḻa caruppetimaṅkalattu pārattuvāci periya
nampi tiruttuṟaipperumāḷāṉa yā
ṭaiyār tirumaṟaikkāṭuṭaiyāṟku Iṟṟai nāḷ
t tirunantāviḷakku Oṉṟukku nāḷoṉṟukku kuṟuṇiyāka van
ta nellukku tiruviḷakkuppuṟamāka viṭṭa nilamā(ma)vatu rācentira
coḻa vaḷanāṭṭu teṉkāl Aṉapāyacaruppetimaṅkalattu paṭ
ṭaṇaṅkiḻāṉ tavapperumāḷ pakkal nāṉ vilaikoṇṭuṭai
yeṉāy Eṉṉutāṉa koḻi ce laṉ nilat
tukku kiḻpāṟkel nāmattukkāṇi nilattukku meṟ
ku teṉpāṟkellai IrumarapuntuyaRead ‘irumāpuntūya’perumāḷpurattu Ellaikku vaṭakku
melpāṟkellai koṇṭaluṭaiyāṉ pirutikaṅkarayaṉ tirunantavaṉap
puṟamāka viṭṭa nilattukku kiḻakku vaṭapāṟ kellai vilvalaṉ poñā�
� vayal karaikku teṟku Āka Icainta perunāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭ
ṭṭa pottakappaṭi ni Innilaṅkāle nāṉmāvum nām vaitta
tirunantāviḷakkukku tiruviḷakkuppuṟamāka kuṭuttamaiyil Innilattā
l vanta Iṟaimikuti koṇṭu Inta viḷakku cantirātittavarai
yum Erippārkaḷākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu Innilaṅ kāleIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 17.448 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
